title: SuperBake Pro – The Ultimate Animation Baking Solution for Blender
description:
Super Bake Pro – The Ultimate Animation Baking Solution for Blender

No complex setups. No special workflows. No new techniques to learn. Just bake—simply and effectively.



🚀 Overview

Super Bake Pro is the ultimate animation baking solution for Blender. It allows you to bake complex animations effortlessly—including parenting, constraints, and drivers.

Blender’s powerful animation system enables the creation of intricate character, mechanical, and scene animations. However, exporting those animations often leads to broken parenting, missing constraints, or lost motion on special objects.

Super Bake Pro solves this with a one-click solution that preserves all animation data through an intelligent GLTF-based bake/export workflow.

✨ Core Features

🎬 Animation Baking Engine

  • Preserve Parenting – Automatically maintains complex parent-child animation hierarchies.

  • Smart Constraint Handling – Bakes all types of constraints into keyframes.

  • Driver Support – Bakes driver-controlled animations into standard keyframes.

  • Special Object Support – Camera, light, and empty animations are fully preserved.

🎯 Flexible Baking Modes

  • Selected Objects Mode – Bake only selected objects (recommended for parenting workflows).

  • Visible Objects Mode – Bake all visible objects in the scene.

  • Full Scene Mode – Bake all objects in the scene.

  • Smart Mode Switching – Auto-switches to scene mode when nothing is selected.

⚙️ Advanced Animation Options

  • Force Child Animation – Ensures child object animations are preserved.

  • Camera/Light Animation Lock – Preserve animations even when cameras/lights are parented.

  • Shape Key Support – Bake and export/import shape key (morph target) animations.

  • Custom Frame Range – Set specific start/end frames for baking.

🔧 Intelligent Data Handling

  • Material Retention – Optionally keep or ignore material data.

  • Vertex Color Support – Retain vertex color information.

  • Tangent Data Export – Optional tangent data support.

  • Auto-Renaming – Appends "_Baked" suffix automatically after bake.

🎲 Random Renaming Utility

  • Object Renaming – Randomly rename selected objects.

  • Data Block Renaming – Rename meshes, curves, cameras, etc.

  • Material Renaming – Rename all linked materials.

  • Animation Data Renaming – Rename actions and animation data blocks.

  • Unique Name Enforcement – Ensures all new names are conflict-free.

📁 Smart File Management

  • Auto Cache Paths – Intelligently chooses cache location (Documents/Temp).

  • Cross-Platform Support – Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  • Temporary File Cleanup – Automatically deletes export temp files.

  • Error Recovery – Smart rollback system on operation failure.

🧩 Stick with Your Existing Workflow

No need to change your animation process. No need for special node setups. Bake your animations as they are.

  • Create animations using keyframes, constraints, drivers, etc.

  • Use any number of animation data blocks

  • Parent objects in complex hierarchies

  • Add any type of controller or constraint

  • Super Bake Pro handles the rest

📦 Supported Object Types

  • Mesh Objects – Standard mesh animations

  • Curves – Animated curves and paths

  • Surfaces – NURBS surface animation

  • Metaballs – Metaball animations

  • Text Objects – 3D text animations

  • Armatures – Full rig and bone animations

  • Empties – Animation for controllers and reference points

  • Cameras – Movement and parameter animations

  • Lights – Position, rotation, and settings animations

🛠️ Smart Error Handling

  • Detailed Error Messages – Clear guidance and solution suggestions

  • Operation Validation – Checks scene and object status before baking

  • Safe Rollback – Automatically restores original state if something fails

  • Progress Display – Real-time bake status and feedback

🔁 Advanced Features

🔍 Intelligent Animation Detection

  • Auto-detects all animated data blocks, constraints, and drivers

  • Understands hierarchical animation influence

  • Detects implicit motion (constraint-based movement)

📊 Hierarchy Reconstruction

  • Auto-rebuilds original parent-child hierarchy after import

  • Maintains structural relationships

  • Smart name mapping and hierarchy restoration

🎛️ Flexible Export Settings

  • Optimized based on Blender's native GLTF export

  • Smart export parameter selection

  • Auto-adapts to object types and scene content

🧠 Easy to Use, Powerful Under the Hood

Super Bake Pro is designed to be simple yet powerful—ready to use out of the box. Most features include helpful tooltips, and the system provides helpful feedback whenever something goes wrong.

Interface design:

  • Advanced Settings Toggle – Clean layout with optional in-depth controls

  • Smart Defaults – Best parameters pre-configured for common use cases

  • Real-Time Feedback – Informative status messages during operations

  • One-Click Operation – Complex baking in a single click

🔄 Compatibility

Blender Versions

Fully compatible with Blender 3.0+. Only official releases are supported. No beta, alpha, RC, or customized builds.

Animation System Support

Compatible with all standard Blender animation systems:

  • Keyframe animation

  • Armature/skinning animation

  • Constraint-based animation

  • Driver-based animation

  • Shape key animation

  • NLA (Non-Linear Animation)

Add-on Compatibility

Works with most animation-related add-ons, including:

  • Rigify

  • Auto-Rig Pro

  • Many other animation tools

📞 Get Support

If you encounter any issues or have questions, feel free to reach out:

  • Blender Market messaging system

  • GitHub Issues (if open source)

  • Official forums or user communities

🎥 Video Tutorials

(Tutorials are currently in production. Stay tuned!)

The Super Bake Pro 2024 Full Demo Video will cover all features up to 2024, including installation, basic use, and advanced techniques.

Upcoming tutorials will explain in detail how to:

  • Bake complex parent-child animation hierarchies

  • Preserve camera and light animations perfectly

  • Batch process multiple animated objects

Super Bake Pro — Making Complex Animation Export Simple.
documentation:
Super Bake Pro - User Guide

Overview

Super Bake Pro is the ultimate animation baking solution for Blender. It simplifies the process of baking complex animations into clean, exportable keyframes — all with a one-click workflow. Whether you're working with constraints, parenting, drivers, shape keys, or cameras and lights, Super Bake Pro ensures that your animation stays intact.

Installation

  1. Download the .zip file from Blender Market or your preferred source.

  2. Open Blender and go to Edit > Preferences > Add-ons.

  3. Click Install, select the .zip file, and click Install Add-on.

  4. Enable Super Bake Pro in the list.

Once installed, you can access it from the N-panel under the Super Bake Pro tab.

Basic Usage

  1. Select the objects you want to bake.

  2. Set your frame range.

  3. Choose a bake mode:

    • Selected Objects

    • Visible Objects

    • Entire Scene

  4. Adjust optional settings (e.g. preserve materials, custom naming).

  5. Click Bake Animation.

Super Bake Pro will process your scene, bake animations, and generate new baked versions with a _Baked suffix.

Key Features

Core Baking

  • Maintains full parenting and hierarchy

  • Bakes constraints and drivers

  • Supports camera, light, and shape key animations

  • Converts everything into clean keyframes

Bake Modes

  • Selected Objects: Recommended for manual control

  • Visible Objects: Useful for rendering views

  • Entire Scene: Bakes all objects

  • Auto Mode: Uses context-aware logic when nothing is selected

Advanced Options

  • Force child animation retention

  • Camera/light animation preservation

  • Shape key baking support

  • Custom frame range settings

Data Handling

  • Optional material preservation

  • Vertex color and tangent export

  • Automatic _Baked suffix renaming

File & Naming

  • Randomized naming for uniqueness

  • Auto cleanup for temp files

  • Cross-platform path compatibility

Supported Object Types

  • Meshes

  • Curves

  • Surfaces

  • Metaballs

  • Text objects

  • Armatures (bones)

  • Empties

  • Cameras

  • Lights

Compatibility

  • Blender Versions: 3.0+ official releases

  • Animation Types: Keyframes, constraints, drivers, shape keys, NLA

  • Plugin Compatibility: Works with Rigify, Auto-Rig Pro, and others

Troubleshooting

  • Errors will be displayed with suggested solutions

  • Auto rollback will restore original state on failure

  • Always check frame range and object selection before baking

Tips for Best Results

  • Use clean parenting setups where possible

  • Apply transforms before baking

  • Avoid overlapping drivers if not needed

  • Use GLTF export settings optimized for baked data

Getting Help

  • Contact via Blender Market messages

  • Post issues on GitHub (if open source)

  • Ask on forums or community threads

Super Bake Pro – Bake once, export anywhere.
